page_content:
## 1. Dr. Fateme Esmailie (The Personable Leader)  
**Focus:** Senior Design leadership and the pivot to AI.  
**Subject:** Medical School Application Update: Arian Moridani (Senior Design Lead)  
Hi Dr. Esmailie,  
I hope you’re having a great start to 2026—and that your cats are still getting all the treats they deserve!  
Since I led our **Aortic Valve Model** team under your guidance, where we worked on developing an in-house model of human vasculature while reducing unit costs to **under $500**, I have been diving deeper into the technical side of healthcare. I am currently working toward an **M.S. in Computer Science (Machine Learning)** at Georgia Tech.  
I’m applying to medical school this cycle and would be honored if you could update your letter of recommendation. Your courses gave me a vital foundation in both design thinking and technical problem-solving that I carry into my graduate work. To make this as easy as possible, I’ve set up an **Interfolio** account so you only need to provide a single upload for all my applications.  
I have attached my **updated CV** and **project summaries** to reflect my journey since graduation. Thank you again for being such an important part of my path.  
Warmly,  
Arian Moridani  
---
